title: cephalaria leucantha subsp. boetica
intro: Cephalaria leucantha subsp. boetica, also known as White Calendula or Goat's Beard, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Caprifoliaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cephalaria leucantha subsp. boetica include its ability to alleviate pain, reduce inflammation, and combat infections, which can be beneficial in treating conditions such as fever, wounds, and respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile natural remedy for various health concerns.
